items.key: (@@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)) and status = '1'
items.check: @@admin = 1 or bo_phan in (select a.ma_bp from hrbp a, @@sysDatabaseName..hrquyenbp b where dbo.ff_Inlist(a.bp_ref, b.r_access2) = 1 and b.user_id = @@userID)

action.text: if exists(select 1 from hrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv) begin select stt_rec as stt_rec_nv, ten, case when @@language = 'V' then ten_bp else ten_bp2 end as ten_bp, case when @@language = 'V' then ten_vtr else ten_vtr2 end as ten_vtr from vhrnv where ma_nv = @ma_nv return end

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join vhrnv b on a.stt_rec_nv = b.stt_rec where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec order by @@orderByClause

title.v: Lấy số liệu từ phiếu yêu cầu$$90
